response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR seat : varchar
ATTR booking_date : date
ATTR booking_time : time

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR city_id : varchar
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY City
PK city_id
ATTR city_id : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK airplane_id
ATTR airplane_id : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar
ATTR registration : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_type : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_id
ATTR status_id : varchar : PK
ATTR status_name : varchar

ENTITY FlightCrew
PK flight_id, crew_id, crew_type
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR crew_type : varchar : PK

ENTITY BaggageBelt
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR belt_number : varchar

REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=origin_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=destination_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=airplane_id
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_id
REL Flight -> BaggageBelt : 1 -> 0..1 : FK=belt_number
REL FlightCrew -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id
REL FlightCrew -> CrewMember : 1..N -> 1 : FK=crew_id
REL Passenger -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_id
